title: Catch Indicator [Cobblemon Addon]
description: Adds an in-game indicator to instantly identify unseen and already caught Pokémon.
body:
Catch Indicator

✨ Instantly see whether a wild Pokémon is new, already seen, already caught, or has special traits worth noticing.

A clean, lightweight, and polished Cobblemon client mod built to make exploration smoother, smarter, and more rewarding.

*** ## Why Players Love Catch Indicator **Catch Indicator** upgrades wild Pokémon nametags with a clean and highly useful visual information system. While exploring, you can instantly tell if a Pokémon is: * **Unknown** * **Already seen** * **Already caught** * **Shiny** * **Alpha** * **A special size** * **Male or female** No more second-guessing. No more wasted encounters. Just **clear information, right when you need it**. 🎯 And with **v1.6**, the mod goes even further with **configurable right-side suffixes**, **custom shiny icon support**, and **smart compatibility with Cobblemon add-on mods**.

Credit: Some visual assets are based on work by Bivrik from the Fancy Toasts mod. This mod is not affiliated with Fancy Toasts. For any issues related to Catch Indicator, please contact me directly.

*** ## Features ### 👀 Instantly identify new discoveries Wild Pokémon you have never encountered can display a hidden placeholder such as `???`, making brand-new encounters stand out immediately. ### 📖 Seen Pokémon stay readable Once a Pokémon has been encountered, its normal name is shown as expected for a smooth and intuitive progression. ### ✅ Know what you have already caught Caught Pokémon receive a subtle visual indicator, helping you decide in a split second whether to battle, catch, or move on. ### ✨ New configurable suffix system Catch Indicator now supports optional right-side suffixes on Pokémon nametags, including: * **Shiny** * **Alpha** * **Size** * **Gender** Suffix order is clean and intentional: `Shiny -> Alpha -> Size -> Gender` ### 🌟 Custom shiny icon Shiny Pokémon now use a custom icon for a cleaner and more polished nameplate look. ### 🧬 Gender display You can now display Pokémon gender directly in the nametag with simple readable symbols: * `♂` * `♀` ### 📏 Cobblemon Size Variations support If **Cobblemon Size Variations** is installed, Catch Indicator can display Pokémon size presets directly in the nameplate, such as: * `Tiny` * `Average` * `Huge` The option only appears when the mod is actually loaded. ### 👑 Cobblemon Alphas support If **Cobblemon Alphas** is installed, Catch Indicator can detect and display **Alpha Pokémon** automatically. The related config option only appears when the mod is present, keeping the menu clean and relevant. ### 🧬 Better form handling Different Pokémon forms are handled more accurately, making your collection progress feel more consistent and more reliable while exploring. ### ✨ First discovery popups New species and new forms can now trigger a custom animated popup, making discoveries feel more exciting and rewarding. ### ⚙️ Easy configuration Customize the indicator style and main options through your mod menu setup: * **Fabric:** via **Mod Menu** * **NeoForge:** via the **Mods** menu ### 🚀 Built for smooth performance Catch Indicator is designed to stay lightweight and responsive, with instant nametag refreshes in Cobblemon and controlled updates for map mods like JourneyMap to help avoid unnecessary performance impact. *** ## Why Use Catch Indicator? Because sometimes the smallest improvements make the biggest difference. **Catch Indicator** helps turn every exploration session into a smoother, smarter, and more satisfying experience by making wild encounter info instantly readable. It is simple, useful, lightweight, and once you start using it… you won't want to play without it. 🔥 *** ## Requirements * **Minecraft:** `1.21.1` * **Cobblemon:** `1.7+` * **Loader:** **Fabric** or **NeoForge** Use the file matching your mod loader. *** ## Languages Catch Indicator now includes support for multiple languages, including: * English * French * Chinese (Simplified) * Hindi * Spanish * Arabic * Portuguese (Brazil) * Russian * Japanese * German * Korean * Italian * Turkish * Indonesian * Bengali * Urdu * Punjabi * Vietnamese * Telugu *** ## Client-Side Quality of Life Catch Indicator is built to enhance your experience **without getting in the way**. * Clean visual integration * Minimal screen clutter * Fast readability during exploration * Better feedback for new discoveries * More useful wild encounter info at a glance * Vanilla-friendly Cobblemon feel It gives you more information, more comfort, and more confidence while playing, while keeping the game looking clean and familiar. *** ## Game Hosting Need a server for your Cobblemon adventure? 🌍 Host your world with **BisectHosting** and use code **OurStory** for **25% OFF** your first month. Every purchase helps support the development of **Our Story** projects. **Get started here:** [https://bisecthosting.com/ourstory](https://bisecthosting.com/ourstory) *** ## Support the Project If you enjoy the mod and want to help support future updates, previews, and new content, you can support the project here: [**Patreon - Our Story Collection**](https://www.patreon.com/ourstorycollection) Your support helps us keep building high-quality experiences for the Cobblemon community. ❤️
